title: See Some of the Best Astronomy Photos of the Last Year
gist: The ZWO Astronomy Photographer of the Year contest, run by Royal Observatory Greenwich, shortlisted entries from nearly 4,000 submissions across nine categories, with winners due September 17.

insights.claim: The ZWO Astronomy Photographer of the Year competition, administered by Royal Observatory Greenwich, rewards the best images across nine categories from skyscapes to deep-space objects.
insights.speaker: Jake Currie
entities: ZWO Astronomy Photographer of the Year
insights.so_what: Notes a recurring showcase of amateur and professional astrophotography.
insights.locator: This past year, we've been blessed

insights.claim: The contest drew nearly 4,000 entries this year, with winners to be announced on September 17.

entities: ZWO Astronomy Photographer of the Year
